tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, and sample use of participants with or without gastrointestinal cancer and involved in the "Gastrointestinal Cancer Treatment Tesponders" project.

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Type of data submitted. Seq_DNA_SNP_MAF_Sum: Samples were used to generate aggregate mutation annotation file (.maf); Seq_DNA_WholeExome: Whole exome sequencing; Seq_RNA: Whole transcriptome sequencing

tables.description: Sample ID, sample type, and analyte variable obtained from participants with or without gastrointestinal cancer and involved in the "Gastrointestinal Cancer Treatment Tesponders" project.

variables.name: SAMPLE_TYPE
variables.description: Indicates the Tumor / Normal status of a sample

tables.description: Subject ID and consent group of participants with or without gastrointestinal cancer and involved in the "Gastrointestinal Cancer Treatment Tesponders" project.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: Subject and sex of participants with or without gastrointestinal cancer and involved in the "Gastrointestinal Cancer Treatment Tesponders" project.
